PostToolUse.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; ORIG=$(git show HEAD:"$FILE" 2>/dev/null | wc -l); NEW=$(wc -l < "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$ORIG" -gt 50 ] && [ "$NEW" -lt $((ORIG / 2)) ]; then echo "TRUNCATION WARNING: $FILE shrunk from $ORIG to $NEW lines — use Edit not Write on existing files"; exit 1; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; case "$FILE" in *.astro|*.mdx|*.ts|*.tsx|*.json|*.css|*.md) npx --no-install prettier --write --log-level=silent "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true;; esac; exit 0'

PreToolUse.command: bash -c 'cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -30'
